title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVI. Natural History.
content:
I'll away yhame,
        And tell my dame,
        That all my geese
        Are gane but yane;
                And it's a steg ( gander),
                And it's lost a leg;
        And it'll be gane
        By I get yhame.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXXVI. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
